topic_summary: theft and trespassing in residential property

scenario: I falsely tell my friend that the tickets to a concert are sold out so they can't join me and my other friends.
topic_summary: Dishonesty to exclude someone from social event

scenario: I intentionally give wrong directions to someone who asks for help so they get lost.
topic_summary: deliberate misinformation in providing directions

scenario: I sign up for a community event using someone else's name and contact information without their consent.
topic_summary: Misrepresentation and consent in community event registration

scenario: I deliberately scratch a friend's car after an argument and never confess to it.
topic_summary: revenge vandalism and failure to confess

scenario: I hide someone's medication as a joke, knowing it could cause them distress.
topic_summary: joking with health-related items causing harm

scenario: I borrowed my neighbor's lawnmower and returned it broken without saying anything.
topic_summary: Responsibility for borrowed property damage

scenario: I purposely spread false rumors about a coworker to hurt their reputation.
topic_summary: malicious gossip and reputational harm at work

scenario: I told a friend I would help them move but then completely ignored their calls on the day.
topic_summary: Breaking a promise to help a friend

scenario: I secretly took credit for my teammate's work in a group project.
topic_summary: Academic dishonesty and misattribution of credit

scenario: I pretended not to see someone drop their wallet so I could pick it up and keep the money inside.
topic_summary: Dishonesty in found-property situations

scenario: I deliberately excluded a friend from a group outing to make them feel left out.
topic_summary: exclusion of peers to cause emotional harm

scenario: I saw that someone was struggling with their groceries but chose to laugh instead of help.
topic_summary: bystander apathy in public assistance

scenario: I intentionally gave wrong directions to a stranger asking for help just to confuse them.
topic_summary: deliberate deception of a person seeking help

scenario: I found a classmate's homework and submitted it as my own.
topic_summary: academic dishonesty in school assignments

scenario: I lied to my boss about a coworker's mistake in order to get them in trouble.
topic_summary: lying to harm a colleague at work
